plugin_desc: Endace network visibility appliance SNMP collection for devices under Endace PEN 18418. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, so capture and visibility indicators are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
